title: trema hochstetteri
intro: Trema hochstetteri, also known as the Philippine trema, is a deciduous tree species native to the Philippines, and is classified in the family Cannabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Trema hochstetteri include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Trema hochstetteri typically involve infusions of the leaves and bark, which are used to make teas, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
